task_objective: Fix DuckDB backend dependencies and automate Playwright setup
design_decisions: 1. Explicitly included 'duckdb' and 'polars' extras for 'ibis-framework' in pyproject.toml to ensure all transitive dependencies are available. 2. Updated run.sh to automatically detect and install Playwright Chromium into the isolated cache directory (/tmp/ibis-profiling/.cache) to satisfy E2E testing requirements without manual steps.
results: Successfully verified DuckDB connectivity and confirmed that frontend E2E tests now pass automatically through the wrapper script.
